programs.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programs.desc: Joh and Ed go on a Snowy Mountains road trip. Graham gets a tour of Green Camel, Australia's largest organic glass house garden facility. Dr Harry and James show off the latest in dog toys.

programs.title: Million Dollar Minute
programs.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programs.title: Million Dollar Minute
programs.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programs.title: Surf Patrol
programs.desc: Swimmers are banned from the water at Surfers Paradise as the patrol team launches a desperate search for a missing nine-year-old girl. Hosted by Tom Williams.

programs.title: Our Town
programs.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programs.title: Australia's Deadliest
programs.desc: A sea lion attacks a teenage skier, while a young girl is stung by the deadly Irukandji jellyfish, and a first-time spear fisherman is mauled by a shark.
